title: Tikrok v6.0 新的生产级架构，成本不变，但是部署复杂略有增加

title: Ben Horowitz - "Your ONLY job is Right Product, Right Time"
content: Ben Horowitz stresses that a founder’s sole focus should be delivering the right product at the right time. He explains how strategy emerges organically, highlighting the link between a company’s story and its plan. Horowitz advises founders on hiring, fundraising, and decision‑making amid rapid change, notes AI’s impact on teams, and stresses creativity, relationships, and generalist builders as key. He emphasizes navigating uncertainty, the reality of pivots, and that defensibility comes from solving hard problems and building strong customer bonds.
eventKey: ben-horowitz-your-only-job-right
normalizedTitle: ben horowitz - your only job is right product right time

title: Anthropic 推出 Claude for Small Business

title: 如何分享人工智能带来的红利
content: The article discusses ways to distribute the benefits generated by advances in artificial intelligence. It examines the economic, social, and ethical implications of AI proliferation and outlines strategies for ensuring that gains are shared fairly across different sectors and populations. The piece highlights policies, regulatory frameworks, and collaborative initiatives that can promote inclusive growth and mitigate potential disparities arising from AI-driven innovation.

title: 3个月烧638亿，阿里、腾讯同遇“AI水池难题”
content: Alibaba and Tencent collectively spent 63.887 billion yuan on AI and related capital expenditures in early 2026, amid steep free‑cash‑flow deficits. Alibaba’s AI and instant‑retail investments cut operating profits to a loss, while Tencent’s new AI products dragged down earnings by about 8.8 billion yuan. Both companies view AI as a long‑term growth engine, but the current drain highlights the high cost of scaling AI infrastructure and services.

title: 万科最值钱的资产浮出水面
content: Vanke’s 21.4 % stake in global logistics firm GLP could become its most valuable asset if GLP goes public in Hong Kong, potentially raising up to $200 bn in valuation. Vanke’s holding would then be worth $42.8‑$64.2 bn, nearly equal to its current market cap, and could provide quick, high‑quality liquidity versus its slower‑moving real‑estate portfolio. This “exit window” offers Vanke a powerful tool to ease debt and restructure assets amid ongoing financial pressures.

title: 马化腾：一年前以为上了 AI 的船结果发现漏水了，现在站上去但还坐不下去
content: Tencent’s CEO Ma Huateng explained his company’s AI progress at the shareholder meeting. He admitted that Tencent’s early AI foundations were weak and that the firm has been working to catch up. Rather than racing to seize opportunities, Tencent is taking a measured path that aligns with its strengths. He criticised attempts to overtake competitors, noting past failures, and used a boat analogy to describe the lag—initially thinking the “AI ride” was solid, only to find leaks. He hopes the pace will improve.
